prestazioni: Engine: 3UZ-FE V8 (4.3L, 32V, quad-cam) with HKS GT-SS turbo kit (Garrett GT3582R .82 A/R turbine, 68mm compressor, 3.5-inch V-band downpipe) and HKS Hi-Power 80mm blow-off valve, supporting 550whp on E85 with forged internals (JE 9.5:1 pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, ACL race bearings).
Fuel System: Radium Engineering dual fuel pump hanger (340 LPH) with ID1000x injectors, AEM 320LPH in-tank pump, and Motec M150 ECU with flex-fuel sensor for ethanol blending control.

Suspension: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valving for UCF30 subframe geometry), SuperPro poly bushings (front control arms, rear trailing arms), and Cusco 22mm front/19mm rear adjustable sway bars with spherical end links.
estetica: Widebody: Veilside Fortune 03 kit (carbon fiber front bumper, rear quarter panels, and overfenders) with custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap and JDM-spec Celsior UCF30 rear bumper delete (replaced with custom carbon diffuser).
Wheels: Work Meister S1 3P 19x10.5 +15 (front) and 19x12 +30 (rear) in gloss black, paired with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/19 front, 315/30/19 rear).

Interior: Bride Zeta III reclinable bucket seats (red Alcantara with black leather bolsters), Takata Drift III 4-point harnesses, and custom carbon fiber dash overlay with AiM MXS 1.2 Strada digital dash (replacing stock cluster).
